creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
(In reply to Robert Nagy from comment #1)

It seems that it is related to my profile. If I run it with `--user-data-dir=some-other-dir` then it works fine. So I guess I'll nuke and re-create my settings.
Mysterious though that it appeared during a minor upgrade.

Thanks for your help! The issue can be closed in my opinion.

Kind regards,

Jens
